title.en: Somewhere deep in the Dragon River, there is a ...

content.en:
"The Blood Cave Demon Fruit is about to be born!"

Ye Tian also wanted to snatch the Blood Cave Demon Fruit, but the protection of the Blood Cave Demon Fruit by the Shadow Ruins was at the highest level, at least one Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor would be dispatched, and there would be many Origin Middle Realm to protect it around.

Even if he infiltrated the Blood Cave Demon Vine, there was no way to destroy the Blood Cave Demon Vine, let alone destroy the Blood Cave Demon Fruit.

I'm afraid that the moment he makes a move, he will have to be wiped out by the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor in an instant.

However, he couldn't snatch or destroy the Blood Cave Demon Fruit, but Long He had this strength!

According to his understanding, Long He also has an opportunity that is no less than the Blood Cave Demon Vine.

Somewhere deep in the Dragon River, there is a dragon ruin well.

This Dragon Ruin Well will give birth to a Dragon Ruin Golden Bead every long time, and the Dragon Ruins Golden Bead has the same effect as the Blood Cave Demon Fruit, and it is also helpful to impact the Origin Upper Realm, but it is only helpful, and the success rate is still very low.

But Longhe naturally attaches great importance to Longxu Well, and will never allow anyone to destroy Longxu Well.

However, there is no sign of the Dragon Ruin Golden Bead being bred in the Dragon Ruins Well, and the Dragon River and the Shadow Ruins are in a war period, so the defensive strength here is also relaxed, and there is no Origin Upper Realm powerhouse sitting here.

This gave Ye Tian hope to sneak here.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian, as a Dragon River Ordinary Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestor, took a Shadow Ruins Origin Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor to copy his body and infiltrated the Dragon Ruins Well.

His Shadow Ruins Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor's copy body was hiding in the body of the Dragon River's ordinary Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestor, trying his best to hide, and if he didn't explore it carefully, it would not be easy to perceive.

In front of the Dragon Ruins Well.

Six Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors sat here, and among them, there was also a top-notch Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

In addition, there are many formations here to protect it, so safety is naturally not a problem.

After Ye Tian came here, he pretended to have something to report.

Naturally, these six Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors didn't suspect anything, and directly let them in.

But suddenly.

They sensed that there was something wrong with this Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestor, so they had to investigate it carefully.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian made a move and ran directly to Longxu Well.

He knew very well that he was not the opponent of the top-level Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and he did not fight against him, so he directly used the top-of-the-line Beyond Shore Supreme Technique, the Beyond Shore Slashing Technique, and slashed at the Dragon Ruins Well with a fierce blow.

Click!

A gap was cut out of the Longxu Well, and it was naturally very early before it was destroyed.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian directly blew himself up on this replica body, and endless toxins, impurities, and strange energy substances were scattered inside the Longxu Well, trying to pollute the inside of the Longxu Well.

Of course.

He still can't destroy the Longxu Well by doing these things, but it will affect the Longxu Well, and he will no longer be able to give birth to the Dragon Ruins Golden Bead for a long time.

This kind of behavior alone is enough to make Long He angry.

Of course.

Long He would also be very puzzled, why Shadow Ruins would sacrifice a Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor to cause this damage to the Dragon Ruins Well, it seemed very unreasonable.

But Long He didn't think too much, after all, in their opinion, Shadow Ruins still did this.

Sure enough.

Soon, Ju Ying came back, and when he saw such a dragon ruin well, he was extremely angry.

"Clean up the Longxu Well, and repair this gap by the way!"

Ju Ying commanded.

Immediately, he asked an Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor, "What's going on, who did it?"

"Lord Ju Ying, it seems that one of the Origin Middle Realm of the Shadow Ruins sacrificed his life, I don't know why he did this? It stands to reason that it is not worth sacrificing the life of an Origin Middle Realm! Even if it is the Shadow Ruins, there are not many Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors!" one of the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Dragon River reported.

"Shadow Ruins!!!

Ju Ying was furious.

He didn't care what the reason was, in short, Longhe had to take revenge.

He thought that the Blood Cave Demon Fruit in the Shadow Ruins was about to be born, and he immediately thought of a way to retaliate.

"Shadow Ruins, if you want to obtain the Blood Cave Demon Fruit, I will make you fall short!" Ju Ying said coldly.

......

The years passed, and a period of time passed.

The Blood Cave Demon Vine of the Shadow Ruins is gradually about to give birth to the Blood Cave Demon Fruit, and they attach great importance to it, although obtaining the Blood Cave Demon Fruit does not mean that a new Origin Ascending Realm can be born, but at least it is a hope!

If you can't break through once, then ten, hundred, thousand, there will always be a time to break through, in that case, the Shadow Ruins will give birth to one more Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and the strength will skyrocket.

One Origin Ascending Realm is more important than a hundred Origin Ascending Realms.

Seeing that the Blood Cave Demon Fruit was about to be conceived, the Lord of the Shadow and other Origin Upper Realms were guarding it.

But at this time, Long He directly attacked a branch of the Shadow Ruins, which directly angered the Shadow Ruins.

Immediately, Shadow Ruins sent reinforcements over.

However.

Long He attacked the Shadow Ruins with all his strength this time, involving most of the combat power of the Shadow Ruins, and even the Lord of the Shadow Ruins had no choice but to go out to meet them.

As for the task of collecting the Blood Cave Demon Fruit, it was handed over to the top Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins, the Lord of Qi He.

Blood Cave Vine.

The Lord of Qi He silently waited for the birth of the Blood Cave Demon Fruit, and this Blood Cave Demon Fruit was also prepared for him, he was the Heavenly Ancestor with the most hope of breaking through to the Origin Upper Realm among the shadow ruins.

Rumble!!!!

The Blood Cave Demon Vine opened the last energy absorption, and the surrounding energy continued to pour into the Blood Cave Demon Vine.

Immediately after, the Blood Cave Demon Fruit gradually condensed and was about to be truly born.

Seeing this scene, the Lord of Chime He was extremely excited.

But suddenly, a voice came.

"Lord of Chime, this Blood Cave Demon Fruit in your Shadow Ruins can't be saved!"

Hearing this voice, the face of the Lord of Chime He changed, and he instantly locked on to the other party's position.

"The Lord of the Void!"

He recognized it, this was the weirdest Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor in Dragon River, his combat power was not very strong, but his life-saving ability and escape ability were terrifying, and he even escaped his life from the hands of a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Then.

The Lord of the Hidden Mystery picked up a bow, this was the Dragon River Bow known as the top Origin Rule weapon of the Dragon River, and its attack power was no less than that of the inferior Origin Origin Treasure.

What's more, once the Dragon River Bow locks onto its target, it's almost impossible to stop.

Of course.

The Origin Upper Realm can block the Dragon River Bow, but the Lord of Chime He can't stop it!

Burst!

The Lord of the Hidden Mystery shot out the Dragon River Bow, and a terrifying arrow shot out, pointing directly at the Blood Cave Demon Fruit that was about to be born.

Then.

The Lord of Chime He has unleashed the supreme technique of defense - the body of chime stone!

He tried to fend off the arrows of the dragon river bow in the flesh.

Boom!

The arrow of the dragon river bow shot at the body of Qi He's technique, and the power of this arrow was terrifying.

The body of the Lord of Chime He was broken, and his body was injured, but then the arrow shattered, turning into countless rays of light, bypassing the body of Chime He's technique, and continued to shoot towards the Blood Cave Demon Fruit.

In an instant, the Blood Cave Demon Fruit was pierced, and this treasure was gone.

And after shooting this arrow, the Lord of the Hidden Mystery did not look very good, and he was no longer able to shoot the second arrow.

He didn't stay here and fled as soon as possible.

One of the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Shadow Ruins made a move, but they didn't keep the Lord of the Hidden Realm. ~
